vendor_identity.name: Motive
vendor_identity.summary: Motive fleet operations, compliance, telematics, inspection, maintenance, and webhook APIs for transportation and logistics workflows.

catalog_seed_entries.title: Users API
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Open API access for user identities, driver-linked users, and user record synchronization into fleet and operational systems.

catalog_seed_entries.title: Vehicles API
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Open API access for vehicle master data, assignments, and fleet asset synchronization across logistics systems.

catalog_seed_entries.title: Vehicle Gateway API
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Vehicle gateway APIs for telematics device identity, status, and associated onboard fleet connectivity data.

catalog_seed_entries.title: HOS Logs API
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Hours-of-service APIs for ELD compliance, driver duty status logs, and regulatory workflow integration.

catalog_seed_entries.title: Inspection Reports API
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Inspection report APIs for DVIR-style safety workflows, operational inspections, and exception-driven maintenance processes.

catalog_seed_entries.title: Fault Codes API
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Vehicle fault code APIs for maintenance monitoring, service triage, and repair workflow integration.

catalog_seed_entries.title: Webhooks API
catalog_seed_entries.summary: Webhook delivery for near-real-time operational event streaming from Motive into external transportation systems.

transportation.name: Transportation
transportation.description: Fleet telematics, routing, compliance, maintenance, payroll, and logistics integration APIs.

row_defaults.industry_description: Fleet telematics, routing, compliance, maintenance, payroll, and logistics integration APIs.
